title: Vibrant Supermarket Special Sale Flyer AI
sourceTitle: Vibrant Supermarket Special Sale Flyer AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vibrant eye-catching supermarket sale flyer with Special Sale at the top and June 22 to June 28 clearly displayed. Subject: vegetables, fruits, beef, and fresh fish appears as colorful fresh product photography with strong retail appetite appeal and clear category separation. Scene: Bright supermarket promotional layout with energetic shopping atmosphere, clean flyer hierarchy, and dense but readable weekly-deal structure. Composition: Large headline Special Sale at top, date June 22 to June 28 nearby, red-bordered price tags using A vibrant, eye-catching supermarket sale flyer., product clusters for produce, meat, and seafood, plus slogans This Week Hot Deals and Save More, Spend Less. Signature Elements: Preserved vibrant supermarket special sale flyer source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Price Tag Style: bold red-bordered price tags with large numerals. Style: Bold supermarket advertising flyer, colorful product photography, high-visibility promotional typography, clean retail layout, strong discount energy, and print-ready weekly circular finish. Color Palette: Bright reds for price tags, fresh greens from vegetables, fruit yellows and oranges, beef reds, fish silvers, white flyer space, and high-contrast promotional accents. Lighting: Clean commercial product lighting, bright flyer exposure, crisp food photography highlights, and even print-ready illumination across all product groups. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Vibrant Supermarket Special Sale Flyer Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vibrant eye-catching supermarket sale flyer with Fresh Market Deals at the top and July 1 to July 7 clearly displayed. Subject: leafy greens, berries, steak cuts, salmon fillets, and citrus fruit appears as colorful fresh product photography with strong retail appetite appeal and clear category separation. Scene: Bright supermarket promotional layout with energetic shopping atmosphere, clean flyer hierarchy, and dense but readable weekly-deal structure. Composition: Large headline Fresh Market Deals at top, date July 1 to July 7 nearby, red-bordered price tags using A vibrant, eye-catching supermarket sale flyer., product clusters for produce, meat, and seafood, plus slogans Weekly Fresh Picks and Big Savings Today. Signature Elements: Preserved vibrant supermarket special sale flyer source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Price Tag Style: rounded red sale tags with white centers and clear discount prices. Style: Bold supermarket advertising flyer, colorful product photography, high-visibility promotional typography, clean retail layout, strong discount energy, and print-ready weekly circular finish. Color Palette: Bright reds for price tags, fresh greens from vegetables, fruit yellows and oranges, beef reds, fish silvers, white flyer space, and high-contrast promotional accents. Lighting: Clean commercial product lighting, bright flyer exposure, crisp food photography highlights, and even print-ready illumination across all product groups. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Theme: Vibrant eye-catching supermarket sale flyer with Special Sale at the top and June 22 to June 28 clearly displayed. Subject: vegetables, fruits, beef, and fresh fish appears as colorful fresh product photography with strong retail appetite appeal and clear category separation. Scene: Bright supermarket promotional layout with energetic shopping atmosphere, clean flyer hierarchy, and dense but readable weekly-deal structure. Composition: Large headline Special Sale at top, date June 22 to June 28 nearby, red-bordered price tags using A vibrant, eye-catching supermarket sale flyer., product clusters for produce, meat, and seafood, plus slogans This Week Hot Deals and Save More, Spend Less. Signature Elements: Preserved vibrant supermarket special sale flyer source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Price Tag Style: bold red-bordered price tags with large numerals. Style: Bold supermarket advertising flyer, colorful product photography, high-visibility promotional typography, clean retail layout, strong discount energy, and print-ready weekly circular finish. Color Palette: Bright reds for price tags, fresh greens from vegetables, fruit yellows and oranges, beef reds, fish silvers, white flyer space, and high-contrast promotional accents. Lighting: Clean commercial product lighting, bright flyer exposure, crisp food photography highlights, and even print-ready illumination across all product groups. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
